info.title: Sales and Performance MCP
info.description: Raw, queryable sales and catalog data for a retail store. Tools: query_sales (weekly unit/revenue rows) and get_catalog (price, unit cost, stock on hand). No pre-baked analytics — callers construct queries and derive metrics. Runs entirely inside the connector — no external MCP server needed.

post.description: MCP server for raw sales and catalog data. Tools: query_sales, get_catalog.
